race.comment: ESTEE EMM (5) just missed at Eagle Farm on debut and has looked the goods in her two trials leading into this. Promising and with average luck in the run will take plenty of beating. GOSSAMER GLOW (6) debuts for the top stable and owns a Deagon trial win. Has a 2kg claim and despite the awkward gate is likely to feature. DUCHESS DIFFICULT (4) debuts and just missed in a recent Dragon trial. The gate is sticky but she profiles well. RED MOON RISING (10) resumes off a placing here on debut when she led. Will have come on and is in the mix in a race that drops away fairly quickly after that quartet.
